ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the format */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* ISBN of the book */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the book was published */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "edition" TEXT /* Edition of the book */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the author */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Full name of the language */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code for the language (e.g., en, es, fr) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Full name of the format (e.g., Print, Digital) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classification_systems" (
  "classification_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification system */,
  "classification_system_name" TEXT /* Full name of the classification system (e.g., Dewey Decimal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the classification system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_numbers" (
  "class_number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class number */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "classification_system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the classification system */,
  "class_number" TEXT /* Class number for the book */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_numbers_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_numbers_classification_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("classification_system_id") REFERENCES classification_systems ("classification_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "holding_date" TEXT /* Date the book was acquired */,
  "holding_type" TEXT /* Type of holding (e.g., Physical, Digital) */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the book (e.g., Good, Fair, Poor) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the book (e.g., Shelf, Online) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_holdings_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Patron, Librarian) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borrowing_records" (
  "borrowing_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borrowing record */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "borrowing_date" TEXT /* Date the book was borrowed */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the book is due for return */,
  "fines" TEXT /* Fines accumulated by the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the borrowing record (e.g., Active, Returned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borrowing_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borrowing_records_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_borrowing_records_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended book */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)
column_names: Number of pages in the book

Date of death of the author
Code for the language (e.g., en, es, fr)
Full name of the format (e.g., Print, Digital)
